title: Temnadenia stellaris
taxonomy: Temnadenia stellaris is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is a genus of flowering plants that is native to Madagascar. The classification of Temnadenia stellaris is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, and the order Gentianales. Within the family Apocynaceae, it is placed in the subfamily Rauvolfioideae. The classification is based on the plant's morphological characteristics and phylogenetic relationships.

intro: Temnadenia stellaris, also known as 'Morning Glory', is a perennial vine native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering relief from anxiety and insomnia due to its sedative effects. The bioactive constituents of Temnadenia stellaris include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds, which contribute to its potential health benefits, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities.
